zh.lifeSummary: 當Matilda Fitton於大約1250年出生在英國藍卡爾哈伍德時，她的父親Richard Fitton42歲，母親Diana42歲。她和Sir William de Hesketh II至少有3個兒子。她去世於1294年之後。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Matilda Fitton于大约1250年出生在英国藍卡爾哈伍德时，她的父亲Richard Fitton42岁，母亲Diana42岁。她和Sir William de Hesketh II至少有3个儿子。她去世于1294年之后。

nameMeanings.name: Fitton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: from Middle English fiton, fittin ‘lie, falsehood’, for a lier or cheat.

possibly a habitational name from Fitton Hall in Leverington, Cambridgeshire, named in Anglo-Scandinavian as ‘settlement by the meadow-land’, from Old English tūn + Old Norse fit, a term denoting grassland on the bank of a river.

nameMeanings.name: Matilda
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

variants.name: Mathilda
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Matilda Fitton was born about 1250, in Harwood, Lancashire, England, her father, Richard Fitton, was 42 and her mother, Diana, was 42. She had at least 3 sons with Sir William de Hesketh II. She died after 1294.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Matilda Fitton est née environ 1250, à Harwood, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Richard Fitton, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Diana, avait 42 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils avec Sir William de Hesketh II. Elle est décédée après 1294.

de.lifeSummary: Als Matilda Fitton um 1250 in Harwood, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard Fitton 42 und ihre Mutter Diana 42. Sie hatte mit Sir William de Hesketh II mindestens 3 Söhne. Sie starb nach 1294.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Matilda Fitton è nata il circa 1250 nel Harwood, Lancashire, England, sua padre, Richard Fitton, aveva 42 anni e sua madre, Diana, aveva 42 anni. Lei avuto almeno 3 figli con Sir William de Hesketh II. Morì dopo il 1294.

ja.lifeSummary: Matilda Fittonが約1250年にイギリスランカシュアイアハーウッドで生まれた時，父Richard Fittonは42歳，母Dianaは42歳であった。彼女はSir William de Hesketh IIとの間に少なくとも3人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1294年以後に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Matilda Fitton(이)가 대략 1250년 영국 랭카실르 하우드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard Fitton(은)는 42세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Diana(은)는 42세였다. 그녀는 Sir William de Hesketh II(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1294년 이후 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Matilda Fitton nasceu aproximadamente 1250, em Harwood, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Fitton, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Diana, tinha 42 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhos com Sir William de Hesketh II. Ela faleceu após 1294.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Matilda Fitton родилась около 1250 г. в местности харвуд, ланкашир, Англия, её отцу по имени Richard Fitton было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Diana, 42. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына от Sir William de Hesketh II. Она умерла после 1294 г.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Matilda Fitton nació aproximadamente 1250, en Harwood, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard Fitton, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Diana, tenía 42 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos con Sir William de Hesketh II. Murió después de 1294.
